login.subtitle: WhatsApp se login karein
login.qrInstructions: WhatsApp → Linked Devices → Link a Device → QR scan karein
login.qrRefresh: QR ~20 sec mein refresh hota hai
login.pairingInstructions: WhatsApp → Linked Devices → Link with phone number
login.enterCodeOnPhone: Yeh code phone par enter karein
login.qrDescription: QR code generate karein aur apne phone se scan karein. Connect hone ke baad dashboard khul jayega.
login.pairingDescription: Apna WhatsApp number daalein — phone par code aayega, yahan enter karein.
login.pairingSessionNote: Format: 923166723252 (+ ya space ke baghair). Purana linked account pehle clear hoga. Code sirf usi phone par enter karein.
login.footer: Bina channel link ke koi data ya route accessible nahi hoga

errors.pairingFailed: Pairing start nahi hui — number check karein
